name: McBurney Center
description: McBurney Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corbin, KY. There are 2 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — $5 day pass for center or you can purchase an annual membership.

name: Miller Park
description: Miller Park is a place to play pickleball in Corbin, KY. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Williamsburg Courts
description: Nets are removed in winter to prevent seasonal damage.
